mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.disease_id, d.disease_name, d.source FROM diseases d INNER JOIN herb_disease_rel hd ON d.disease_id = hd.disease_id WHERE hd.tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId} ORDER BY d.id ASC
SELECT id, disease_id, disease_name, source FROM diseases WHERE disease_id = #{diseaseId}

SELECT t.tcm_tar_id AS tcmTarId, t.symbol, t.gene_entrez_id AS geneEntrezId, t.uniprot_id AS uniprotId, t.description, dg.relation, dg.source FROM targets t INNER JOIN disease_gene_rel dg ON t.tcm_tar_id = dg.tcm_tar_id WHERE dg.disease_id = #{diseaseId} ORDER BY t.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.tcm_prescription_id AS tcmPrescriptionId, p.name_zh AS nameZh, p.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, p.source, p.indications_zh AS indicationsZh, p.indications_en AS indicationsEn, p.effects, p.effects_zh AS effectsZh FROM tcm_prescriptions p INNER JOIN prescription_disease_rel pd ON p.tcm_prescription_id = pd.tcm_prescription_id WHERE pd.disease_id = #{diseaseId} ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN herb_disease_rel hd ON h.tcm_herb_id = hd.tcm_herb_id WHERE hd.disease_id = #{diseaseId} ORDER BY h.id ASC
